_meta._comment: Sort patch notes by: 1. Type, 2. mod, 3. text. Keep patch notes simple and concise. Do not have duplicate mod+type entries — merge them into one.

changes.text: Added Ancient Amulet (Mother of Scarabs Lair) to HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP. Added Mother of Scarabs Lair to Epee; Pierre's Kitchen and Serpentine Tower Basement to Spellbook of Ancient Arcana.

Right-click floating editor is narrower (250px) and hides portrait level badges. Main modal footer shows “✓ Settings auto-save when changed” with a game-styled Close button (right-click menu unchanged). Empty equipment slots use the in-game circle-plus placeholder at the same 34px size as equipped items in the list and detail panel.
Removed max-width limits and flex wrapping so Time, Rank, and Floor stay on one row instead of breaking when the panel content is wider.
Exposes window.betterBoostedMapsExcludedEquipment for equipment-lua-export.js exclusion sync checks.
Exposes window.betterExaltationChestExcludedEquipment for equipment-lua-export.js exclusion sync checks.

Running modal can show full live stats (S+ rate and rank breakdown, completion rate, win times, median, estimated XP, elapsed time) updated after each run. Settings adds Show advanced live stats during analysis (on by default); when off, the compact view shows progress, avg run time, est. remaining, and completion rate only.

Wiki Lua export via dumpEquipmentWikiLua() downloads equipment-wiki-YYYY-MM-DD.lua (wiki page layout with _Tiers and aligned keys). Maintainer diffEquipmentLuaExclusionSets() compares local chest/boost exclusion lists against live mod globals; optional clipboard via { copy: true }.

Firebase Best Runs Upload adds a collapsible Regions to upload section (all regions ON by default) so you choose which regions are included in manual and auto-uploads; manual Upload still does a full rebuild and omits disabled regions. Other Maps appears only when Run Tracker has unmatched runs (legacy or event map keys).
Always starts disabled on init; speed factor still persists from Mod Settings → Advanced.

Final-run autoplay resume now finds and clicks the green Start button (game UI uses Start text, not a lucide-play icon). Fixed resume falsely reporting success without clicking Start (missing await). Final-run game-end wait now runs the full 2-minute timeout instead of giving up at 30 seconds.

Redesigned modal: 420×420px two-column layout with a 100px Allies column showing creature and equipment icons only (no names) and a live-updating detail panel; toolbar button disabled when the board has no heroes. List portraits use in-game rarity borders, star-tier overlays, and outlined level badges; equipment icons update as you edit. Board right-click opens a compact floating editor for the clicked ally. Removed Apply and Reset — changes apply immediately; Close only.
Portrait level badge renders correctly again (outlined game font instead of invisible text or gray fallback). Equipment tier input clamped to 1–5.
Fixed a visible gap between modal title and body (widget-top / widget-bottom) in game-styled dialogs.

Settings moved from Mod Settings to a right-click context menu on the panel: opacity, size (80–120%), top/bottom placement with centered scaling, nav Highscores button toggle, and Time/Rank/Floor column visibility. Panel hide/show persists across battles and map changes; unchecking the last visible column re-enables all three. Visibility checkboxes use full labels (Show navigation button, Show Time, Show Rank, Show Floor) instead of a separate Show heading.
Panel background now shrink-wraps the framed content on window resize; width and height track visible columns instead of stretching past the border or leaving texture outside the frame.

Running modal shows live completion rate (grey below 100%, green at 100%). Results modal adds a Generate Setup Name button that copies a Setup Manager-friendly label (e.g. 85% S+120 f3 142min 156med). Copy notifications (setup name, replay data) use the native game-style toast instead of a fixed banner. Thanks to whoman2 for these improvements.

Added Soft Boots (Darama Oasis) and Spellbook of Ancient Arcana (Putrid Chamber) to HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP. Removed explicit false entries (Jester Hat, Rubber Cap, Steel Boots); items omitted from the table are treated as not boosted.
Mod button bar layout (horizontal, vertical, or hidden) persists across page refreshes.
Removed Better Highscores opacity, size, placement, and nav button controls; configure those from the panel right-click menu.
Equipment tab checkboxes are enabled only for items listed in HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP with boosted maps; unlisted game equipment is greyed out and cannot be toggled.

Welcome mod loading completion now reports success only when all enabled mods load without errors. Failed loads show an incomplete toast and auto-refresh after 3 seconds (up to 3 retries). Fixed the completion listener never registering (trackEventListener), the fallback timer firing too early during long batch loads, and the loading toast disappearing before mods finished. Mod button bar z-index restored to 100–101 (below game z-modals at 200) so Game mode and other native dropdowns render above mod buttons again.
Speed factor in Mod Settings → Advanced now persists across page reloads. Fixed startup clearing saved config and loading from the wrong storage path; legacy saves are migrated on load.
Player stats caps are now centralized in CYCLOPEDIA_SETTINGS.playerStatCaps for easier updates, and progression maxima were updated to Perfect Creatures 75, BIS Equipments 126, and Explored maps 73.
Dust counter and gain animation read inventory.dust (not context.dust, which was often 0), so auto-disenchant no longer animates toward zero or shows a negative count.

Mod buttons show on mobile WebExtensions (e.g. Orion iOS): Chrome injects the top frame only (like upstream), subframes are skipped; api.ui keeps addButton when UI components load; mod bar uses z-index 9999 and safe-area insets; bundled mods wait for bestiary-mod-api-ready before batch execution.

Added Ankrahmun to regionNamesToIds. serializeBoard no longer returns empty JSON when a region ID is missing from the static map—it falls back to state.utils.REGION_NAME or title case and registers the mapping for later calls.
Chest settings equipment dropdown truncates long names with ellipsis when the row is narrow; full name shows on hover.

Per-run and chart replay copy works on Ankrahmun maps (and other regions missing from the static list at first serialize). getBoardData discards incomplete cached board JSON instead of reusing {seed, floor} only; local serializeBoard uses the same region name fallbacks as BA Sandbox Utils.

Dice and creature stats update live after rolls without reloading the page: inventoryDiff applies via player setState (including object-style stack counts), monster stats use immutable state updates instead of in-place mutation, and the modal refreshes details and the creature list when autoroll finishes or stops. Fixed the monster TTL cache never clearing, duplicate creature-search repaints (e.g. filtered lists), and stale Details panel data after rolls. Live dice count refresh is scoped to the Dice Roller modal only (data-dice-roller-tier-count), so other open dialogs no longer get wrong counts or lose the game’s canvas quantity font.

getShinyProgressCreatureNames() and isShinyProgressCreatureName() define the normal shiny collection pool (excludes event creatures, gazers, and species without a shiny variant) for Cyclopedia progress stats.
Hardcoded map stats for unobtainable bosses Morguthis, Cobra Statue, Obelisk, Omruc, and Rahemos so Cyclopedia shows in-map levels and base stats instead of placeholder getMonster data.

Home start page: shiny creature progress counts only normal obtainables (69 max, matching perfect creatures); owned event shinies show as (+N) with a hover tooltip listing species (hidden when zero). Player stats Rankings header reads Rankings - Season N and updates with the season toggle. Layout uses a 35/65 grid with 10px column gap and 10px outer padding (no fixed 900px row). Status label stays centered; Free/Premium value is left-aligned beside the pass icon. Arsenal Owned Equipment and Characters Rankings drop the trailing frame border when they are the rightmost column; Characters Player Information no longer shows an inner scrollbar. Maps tab left column: Regions list uses 40% height (was 35%); Maps list fills the remainder.

Bundled mods load more reliably on mobile WebExtensions (e.g. Orion iOS): page fetch is still tried first on desktop; when HEAD/fetch or mod-registry import fails, mods load via background getModContent (correct mods/ and database/ paths), an embedded registry fallback list, and a 1.5s page init execution fallback if background registerLocalMods is late. Skips mods already executed to avoid double-loading on PC.

Enable Maxed Creatures now recognizes game hundo slots (star-tier-hundo, rarity-hundo) and level-50/99 copies with 100 total genes, not only star-tier-shiny and .has-rarity borders. Enable Shinies applies its border styling to rarity-awaken and rarity-hundo overlays (e.g. awakened shinies at level 95) instead of setting data attributes with no visible frame.

Rank points category is floor 0 only (same rule as speedrun): wins above floor 0 no longer save to rank and only update floor tracking. On load, existing rank entries with floor > 0 are removed. Cyclopedia rank table hides any leftover ascension-floor rank rows.

Panel header shows only the map name and enemy count (e.g. Sewers (1)) instead of prefixing with Awaken Tracker. Resizing matches Hunt Analyzer: eight edge/corner handles, min/max panel size (260×180–1200×900), and position updates when resizing from the top or left; drag clamps to the viewport. Footer merges Clear Map/Clear All with credits—tracker tab shows actions plus credits, overview tab shows credits only.

Centralizes Cyclopedia-only creature data: hidden list entries, unobtainable map stat overrides, stat-bar display config, and cached getMonsterNameMap() for faster lookups. getCyclopediaCreatureNames() applies the hidden-creature filter in one place.

Performance and maintainability refactor: creature/equipment lists batch game-state reads; debounced Bestiary/Equipment search with cached row metadata; shared database helpers and deduplicated replay, search, and styling utilities; home search uses DocumentFragment; Rankings player search refreshes row highlights without rebuilding the tab. Tab body uses Hunt Analyzer–style 4-frame border. Layout fixes: Bestiary and Maps left lists no longer clip when detail content loads; Maps Map Information scrolls only the creature list; Bestiary detail uses three flex-width columns with no horizontal scrollbar (ability, location, and owned sections scroll vertically). Modal UI is English-only (removed mods.cyclopedia i18n; copy in CYCLOPEDIA_UI). Column/box titles share widget-top pixel-font-16 styling via createCyclopediaWidgetTitle. Profile loading and error states use shared HTML helpers.

Waits for game state before building ALL_EQUIPMENT (same lazy-init pattern as creature-database.js), with a placeholder global until load completes; fixes empty Arsenal/Cyclopedia equipment lists on early load. Adds cached getEquipmentNameMap() for O(1) equipment name-to-gameId lookups.

Map filter bar drops the Map Filter heading and centers a fixed 200px dropdown with ellipsis and full-name tooltip on long map names; Go to map button is capped at 25×25px. Dropdown list highlights only the active map (no stuck hover rows when reopening) and truncates long entries with tooltip.
Exports itemKeyGroups (currency, no-rarity, and upgrade item keys) for shared use with Cyclopedia inventory categorization.
Mod bar button updates use api.ui.updateButton so text/icon display mode is preserved; adds an explicit runner icon for icon mode.

getRegionDisplayName() resolves labels from state.utils.REGION_NAME, REGIONS[].name, static REGION_NAME_MAP (includes Ankrahmun), then title case; adds getRegionDisplayNameFromRegion() for REGIONS entries. Better Boosted Maps, Raid Hunter, Room Hopper, Stamina Optimizer, Cyclopedia, and Mod Settings (run export/region sort via resolveRegionDisplayName()) dropped inline REGION_NAME_MAP copies. mod_development_guide.md documents using REGIONS and these helpers instead of hardcoded region lists. isMapRaidComprehensive() and getRegionsInOrder() unchanged.

Mod button bar toggle uses game frame/background assets and arrow icons, is pinned 35×35px in the bottom-right corner, and cycles layout on click: horizontal row, vertical stack, then hidden. Mod bar buttons support text or icon labels (Mod Settings → Interface) via a built-in icon registry; tooltip is used as a text fallback when label text is omitted. Hero Editor shows a Hero Editor label instead of the pencil icon; Team Copier and Tick Tracker Settings show text labels in text display mode (were icon-only). Runtime label changes should use updateButton or refreshModButtonLabels().

Turbo speed (2x–10x) moved to Advanced below Always navigate max floor and above Firebase Best Runs; help text is on the section ⚠️. Controls that need another mod show ⚠️ and are disabled when that mod is off (Run Tracker toggle, Better Highscores opacity/button, Firebase runs upload, backup run/hunt include toggles). Depot Manager, Hunt Analyzer, and VIP List sidebar tabs hide when their mod is disabled. Interface adds Mod bar button labels (Text/Icons); that control and Inventory Mod Buttons are grouped under Show Highscores Button (section divider removed).
Removed the cogwheel Turbo Settings button and config panel; configure speed in Mod Settings → Advanced.
Mod bar button keeps the ⚠️ Autoplay delay warning in text display mode after init; label updates use api.ui.updateButton instead of textContent so refreshModButtonLabels() no longer strips it.

Shiny enemies no longer skips obtainable orcs (e.g. Orc Spearman) on maps like The Orc King Hall; unobtainable prefix matching is limited to numbered variants (e.g. Dwarf Henchman 4) and uses creatureHasShinyVariant for creatures without shiny sprites.

Improvement Opportunities modal is 500×550px with flex-height tab lists. Tick Improvements footer reports rooms with tick improvement, total tick improvement, and theoretical minimum. Rank Improvements lists same-rank rooms and a Same-rank tick gain stat (aligned with Floor). Rows compare your record vs a profile-linked WR holder: tick tab as N ticks; rank as N points; floor as ascension % (100 + floor×20). Rank and floor show tick counts only when points or % match; same-rank and same-floor tick gains use +N ticks (pct%).

Shiny Mystic Gazer is exposed as Albino Gazer for Cyclopedia and creature pickers. Shared helpers split inventory by display name (shiny-only vs non-shiny Mystic), resolve portraits, and mark other gazers as having no shiny variant. EVENT_CREATURES and isEventCreatureName() exclude seasonal creatures (Merrymancer, Gumslinger, Saboteur, Gummy Raider, Reindeer, Unionized Goblin) from Autoscroller and Autoseller pickers; Yeti remains selectable.
Bestiary lists Albino Gazer separately from Mystic Gazer (shiny vs non-shiny gameId 97), including roles, portraits, and owned panels that no longer mix the two.

Creature picker is a searchable icon grid (5 per row, Dice Roller–style) with green tile selection; includes Albino Gazer; excludes gazers and seasonal event creatures. Autosell option label is dynamic: "Late-game hunt" when tier 5 scroll is selected with no targets (before enabling the checkbox), otherwise "Autosell non-selected"; Hunt button still requires the checkbox. Hunt targets, stop conditions, and autosell match shiny and non-shiny Mystic separately. Modal 770px wide, creatures column 190px.
Autoplant creature lists and keep/ignore matching use creature-database display rules so Albino and Mystic Gazer settings apply to the correct inventory copies.
Albino Gazer added to the unselectable creature list alongside the other gazers.
Albino Gazer uses the same ×0.1 difficulty multiplier as other gazers.
Auto Dice Roller modal is 710px wide (was 700px); dice rules column is 230px (was 220px).
Shiny Mystic Gazer drops are labeled Albino Gazer in session creature details.
Logs and inject messages use Albino Gazer for shiny Mystic Gazer copies.
Exposed farming state (isFarming) now updates immediately when boosted map farming starts or is cancelled, so other mods detect navigation in progress without stale flags.

Dragon Plant collect now tracks only the 5% collect bonus (not stored plant gold), adds it to Gold total and Gold sources (Loot | Creatures | Dragon Plant), and shows collect count as one event per collect session. Summary and tooltips use the Dragon Plant label with total bonus gold and (Nx) collects.

Registered with Mod Coordination at priority 5 (below Better Boosted Maps). Yields while Better Boosted Maps is navigating or farming, recognizes Better Boosted Maps autoplay sessions instead of treating them as player autoplay, and still applies low-stamina stops during delegated boosted-map farming.

Creature squeeze dust is now tracked from inventory.monsterSqueezer responses in sessions (including Manual Runner/Autoseller squeeze flow) and shown as a separate source in Dust summaries, map breakdowns, rates, and tooltips (Loot | Disenchants | Creature Squeezes). Added localized label support for Creature Squeezes.
Summary log now shows Dragon Plant autocollect as per-collect value with collect count (5K per collect), and the Experience line now includes Exp/h rate.

Gold total and Gold/h now support creature sell value with response-only tracking from game.sellMonster and quest.plantEat (no estimates). Gold source details were expanded in tooltips and copied logs (loot vs creatures, per-source rates, grouped shiny/sealed under creature totals), map summary now follows the same gold-source breakdown, and Dragon Plant details can be shown as collected value in tooltips plus autocollect status in the summary. Dust total and Dust/h now also split sources (loot vs disenchants) using response-only tracking from game.equipToDust (dustDiff), including tooltip and summary/map source-rate breakdowns. Hunt Analyzer session debug logs now include equipment drop counts, use compact single-line output, and duplicate intermediate sell/dust capture logs were removed in favor of reconcile logs. When sold-creature tracking is disabled, creature lines are now hidden from Gold/Gold-h tooltips instead of showing disabled labels.

Hunt Analyzer settings now include checkboxes to include/exclude creature sell value, disenchanted equipment dust, and Dragon Plant collect details in Gold/Gold-h and Dust/Dust-h tooltip and summary outputs.

Autoduster pending equipment retries now keep reward equipment IDs alive briefly when inventory snapshots lag (common in fast Manual Runner loops), and perform rapid same-cycle retries plus immediate equipDrop-id dust attempts before inventory fallback to make dusting happen much faster and avoid long Manual Runner stalls.

Sealed auto-inject target selection for same-creature awakened copies now prioritizes higher level, then higher total genes, then inventory order. If the top target is skipped (e.g. no gene gain, on-board, or target error), Autoseller retries progressively weaker same-gameId awakened targets before giving up.

Auto-inject sealed creatures now uses the same awakened-target priority as Autoseller for matching gameId targets (level, then total genes, then inventory order), and retries weaker targets when stronger ones are skipped or injection fails.
New highscores now replace old entries immediately after battle: post-battle refresh bypasses stale cached snapshots, avoids caching forced-refresh reads, and clears map cache when a run ends.

Creature rolls can be awakened (50% per awakenable creature; gazers and other non-awakenable species excluded). Awakened villains use awaken abilities in battle and add ×1.5 to that creature’s difficulty contribution. Rolled cards show the awaken icon; replays and multiplayer sync store awakened per creature.

Hidden database mod loads maintainer names from Firebase config/admins (read-only in rules). Shared by VIP List All Chat cleanup and Guilds global reset. Removes obsolete admin throttle keys from localStorage on init.
Advanced → Guild skill admin (Firebase admins only): one button deletes skill-progress, player-skills, and player-equipment for all players after confirm + typing RESET.
All gazers (Chubby, Mystic, Psychic, Spiky, Sturdy) use ×0.1 difficulty in CREATURE_DIFFICULTY_MULTIPLIERS, same tier as Dharalion.
Local run warnings (speedrun, rank, floor) use shared helpers; removed the redundant "no board pieces" warning now handled by RunTracker.

Background guild sync no longer downloads the full guild list and every member list each minute; it uses /guilds/players/{hash} plus a single guild document. Full member-list reconcile runs only when opening the guild UI or once per session if local data disagrees. Global skill/equipment reset is admin-only via Mod Settings (Firebase config/admins).

Hunt Analyzer and VIP List settings tabs are always shown in the menu (not only when those mods are enabled in the popup). Firebase best runs use v2 per-map storage with delta PATCH uploads; manual upload still does a full rebuild. Auto-upload check interval is 60 seconds. v1 blobs remain readable.

Private inbox polling uses incremental orderBy timestamp (Firebase index on messages/$player) with full-fetch fallback. All Chat polls by timestamp when the tab is open. All Chat cleanup (30+ days) runs on init for Firebase admins only; removed Mod Settings button and 7-day throttle.
Solo "Creatures allowed" persistent toast no longer blocks clicks on the battle Start button; toast row uses pointer-events: none except on interactive toasts.

Runs with an empty board snapshot (setup.pieces length 0) are auto-pruned on init and import, blocked on new saves for speedrun/rank/floor, and pruned before Mod Settings Firebase upload and local best-runs download.
Inbox incremental queries no longer return HTTP 400 when Firebase .indexOn was on messages instead of messages/$player (see chat_documentation.md).

Per-creature right-click option "Keep upgrades to level 50" on the Autoseller tab: keeps up to 5/4/3/2 copies per gene band (50–59 / 60–69 / 70–79 / 80–100) using full inventory counts. Excess copies are still sold, devoured, or auto-squeezed; protected 80–100% copies override autosqueeze for that species only. ⬆ indicator and summary hover tooltip; setting stored in autoseller-settings.

Auto-upgrade forge marks (red border and stripe overlay) now apply only to equipment in the modal Arsenal grid, not the main game Arsenal sidebar. Closing and reopening the modal resets col1 to the full equipment list — auto-upgrade selection, equipment filter, search, tier filter, and highlights no longer persist across sessions. During auto-upgrade forging, consumed and newly forged equipment now updates col1 in the modal (add/remove/refresh target the modal grid instead of the native game Arsenal).

Custom "Starting Stamina Optimizer" toast when an action runs (same style as Better Boosted Maps) and a low-stamina stop toast. Clears open modals before navigation; navigation and auto-setup delays aligned with Better Boosted Maps timing.

Disabling automation no longer shows the low-stamina stop toast. Stopping autoplay retries the pause button and no longer falls back to manual mode (which could start a manual battle); idle autoplay is released without forcing a mode change.

Maps tab and per-map right-click equipment rules now use equipment-database.js HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP instead of a hardcoded map blocklist. Only maps with at least one wiki boosted equipment are selectable; context menu equipment is limited to items that boost on that map. Equipment tab lists all equipment; HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP false and EXCLUDED_EQUIPMENT rows stay greyed out and cannot be toggled. Steel Boots set to false (Dragon Lair removed).

Per-map cogwheel (⚙) no longer appears after opening the right-click context menu and closing without real changes. Per-map settings are only saved and shown when equipment rules exist or stamina/setup differ from global defaults; reverting to defaults clears the stored override.

Autosqueeze and autoduster retry when an action is skipped: incomplete squeeze (inventory not synced, API failure, or partial batch) and pending disenchant each requeue the battle up to 3 times. Autoplant no longer gives up after one inventory sync when the drop is in the autosqueeze gene band (80–100); those rewards get the full sync retry window. Dragon Plant activation is deferred while a game-end retry is pending and runs after a successful queued retry.

Fast autoplay map clears no longer skip autosqueeze, autoduster, or late equipment drops. Game-end processing captures serverResults when the battle ends (not after the next fight), retries when the run cooldown blocks, and requeues when reward creatures are not in inventory yet. Skull Helmet–style equipDrop that arrives on a later board tick is queued and flushed via pending disenchant; duplicate equipment queueing is avoided. Dragon Plant devour runs after squeeze/disenchant and does not eat creatures in the autosqueeze gene band (80–100). Game-end cooldown reduced from 5s to 2s; pending dust flush uses its own short throttle.
Console debug channels [GameEnd], [EquipDrop], [Sell], [Squeeze], [Disenchant], and [Devour] for tracing fast-clear timing; squeeze filter logs show each drop’s gene total vs the configured band.

Fixes long hunts where playtime kept growing but battle stats reset after reload. Battle history now persists in IndexedDB; totals, playtime, and session count stay in a small localStorage manifest (no version field). Legacy saves with battles embedded in localStorage migrate on first load. Session cap 100,000; reload keeps lifetime totals when history was trimmed (max-merge persisted vs session-derived totals). HuntAnalyzerAPI (saveData, exportAll, importAll) for Mod Settings backup with flush before export. Theme changes update live rate lines and resource totals; language switch keeps loot/creature title counts. Copy log map breakdown uses the same loot/creature sort order as the panel.
Hunt Analyzer export/import includes IndexedDB battle history via HuntAnalyzerAPI (flush before export).
Start page home search results table: alternating light grey row stripes (grayBrightest / grayHighlight) are visible again; row hover uses in-game highlight styling.

Hotkeys tab (Mods section): configurable keys to open Room Hopper (default P) and Cyclopedia (default C); warnings when those mods are disabled. Monstrous Cauldron default hotkey moved from C to O so C can open Cyclopedia (existing saves still on C for the cauldron are migrated to O on first load).
Search field is focused automatically when the modal opens so you can type immediately.

Start page home search is focused automatically once the Home tab finishes loading (after profile data), so you can type immediately. Maps tab Map Information (Season 1/2): boosted-map equipment icons on the selected map thumbnail (wiki reverse lookup from HARDCODED_BOOSTED_MAP); 32×32 item portraits with tier-5 rarity border (no stat icon); click opens that equipment in Arsenal. Region map list summary rows do not show these icons.

Inventory database: Creature Awakening (65,000 gold) and Dr. Mephistopheles (66,666 gold) under Upgrades; Cyclopedia Inventory tab reads upgrade list from the database. maps-database.js: getRegionsInOrder() exposes game region order for other mods.

New Super Mod: header button opens a searchable room table (map thumbnail, enemy creatures, equip drops, avg XP and XP/stamina) with region filter, hide-raids toggle, sortable Room and XP/Stam columns, and one-click teleport via selectRoomById; travel is blocked while a run is in progress.

Experience estimates (optional setting) now use live board villain levels capped at 50 for the post-battle formula, and ignore Orc and Sweaty Cyclops (map props that do not pay XP). Fixes large overestimates on high template levels (e.g. Lonesome Dragon) and Orcsmith Orcshop counting spawned Orcs.
Tab foreground restore no longer switches to autoplay during Board Analyzer or Manual Runner runs (or while the board is in sandbox), preventing client crashes from missing serverResults.

Autoplay delay (renamed from Faster Autoplay): delay range 10ms–180s (was 0–3s), Advanced field labeled Delay (ms), values clamp to min/max while typing and on save; applied delay is clamped at runtime.

When 'Estimate experience gained' is enabled, console logs under [Board Analyzer][XP] show per-run estimate breakdown (eligible vs excluded enemies, level sum, d20) and real battle expReward from game.gameServer responses for comparison.

Start page: profile and season tabs in column 1; merged search column (Room Hopper–style filter bar and results table with Entry / Type / Details). Type filter includes Abilities; maps and regions share the Maps type; region dropdown removed. Home search portraits: creatures use /assets/portraits/{gameId}; equipment and inventory use in-game item sprites without stat, rarity frame, or slot background. Inventory catalog groups (e.g. all Summon Scroll tiers) are indexed and clickable navigation opens the correct variant.

Settings: compact 300px modal, side-by-side fields, info icons for descriptions, red inline validation on max/min inputs. Map list uses in-game order and Cyclopedia region names; skips navigation when already on the target map; Better Setups labels (disabled Save = setup already on board). Logs each stamina check.
Creature Drops header total now matches per-icon stack counts; portraits are rebuilt from aggregated data instead of reusing stale DOM overlays.

Specific-map mode resumes after pause when stamina refills; setup load no longer reports success when the Setup button is missing; cleanup clears duplicate intervals/timers and blocks callbacks after unload.

Long-run performance (250+ attempts): slimmer per-attempt history (no full serverResults stored), fewer JSON clones, single pending serverResults entry, reward-screen checks via board snapshot and openRewards subscription instead of repeated board.select() polling.

Cleanup and force-stop now tear down gameTimer, clear reward-screen callbacks, and reset transient state consistently; [Perf] console checkpoints every 25 attempts (attempt time, subscription counts, Chrome heap) to spot slowdown during long sessions.
Bestiary Tier sort: when tier, genes, and rank match, creatures now tiebreak by name instead of map usage.
Playtime stays at 00:00:00 until the first completed hunt is recorded; idle time before that (autoplay timer, manual mode, map changes) is no longer counted.

Auto-inject success toast and console logs now show creature names (via creature database / game API) instead of gameId:N placeholders. Post-attempt cleanup waits up to 10s for the board to go idle (gameStarted) before the next run — same window as start-button recovery — and stops the run if it stays busy instead of failing with "start button unavailable".
Depot creature search: shiny, sealed, and awakened filters (combine with name/stat search via AND/OR, e.g. dragon AND shiny, sealed AND /HP >15).
Session inject counters (✓ / skipped) now update from Manual Runner auto-inject via the same inject events as Autoseller.

Added "Auto-inject sealed creatures" (config toggle): injects tier-5 drops into matching awakened creatures when genes improve the target (costs gold), with Autoseller-style success toast and Awaken Tracker inject events. When autosell is also enabled, inject runs first, then sell/devour on the reward screen.

Reward handling no longer waits for Automator before inject/autosell; skip defers closing the loot screen when those options are on. Autosell only runs when serverResults includes a creature drop and retries the Sell button while the reward UI stays open. Reduced noisy inject/reward console logging.

Recycle Rune purchase orders: headless fulfillment now uses daily yasir.recycleCost for price-cap checks (was treating your max price as the shop price and could buy above cap). Cap is enforced again in performAction before buy; PO logs include recycleCost and currentListingGold; modal price reads from the original Yasir button, not the quantity total button.

Speedrun category is floor 0 only: wins above floor 0 skip speedrun and save to floor tracking only (higher-floor times are not comparable to floor 0). On load, existing speedrun entries with floor > 0 are removed.
Bug fixes.

Win/loss matches Hunt Analyzer: only truthy rewardScreen.victory saves local runs (victory always taken from rewardScreen). Removed global skip on rank/points === 0 so wins with rank 0 still update speedrun; rank category still requires rank points > 0. Floor tracking unchanged (floor > 0 only).
Bug fixes.
'Stop after any' early-stop setting: green victory / red defeat toggle (click to switch); saved on Save or Start Analysis. Still mutually exclusive with Stop when reaching S+ grade.

Persistence v2: slimmer per-battle loot/creature rows in game localStorage, aggregate loot/creature maps no longer duplicated in the JSON (rebuilt from sessions after load; older saves still load). Storage-full / quota / repeated-save panel warnings use i18n (mods.huntAnalyzer.storageResetDismissHint with {clearAll} + clearAll) so the reset guidance matches locale.

Autoplant plantMonsterFilter now matches autosell sealed handling: gene thresholds use calculateTotalGenes (same mixed flat/genes stats as inventory), and sealed tier-5 creatures with sell/devour allowed use the 5–100% sealed band so the 80%+ keeper rule no longer blocks devour on that path.

Creature detail 'Owned' rows: level-99 max-gene non-shiny copies now show the hundo star icon (star-tier-hundo) and hundo slot border (rarity-hundo) like the base game, instead of always using the shiny max star and shiny border.

Disenchant staging no longer hides or strips items from the main Arsenal sidebar: hide/show, search sync, add/remove, and restore paths now scope to the modal Arsenal grid (#better-forge-modal-arsenal-grid) vs the vanilla equipment grid, instead of matching the first duplicate button on the whole page.
Farm Maps panel now flags raid maps with a red RAID badge and a left-edge raid stripe, and provides a 'Hide raids' toggle (persisted per-user) to filter them out of suggestions.

Tracker tab now shares the same background and game-asset pixel-art borders as the Overview tab (on all row elements, including its own panel body). Stat (+1/+2) delta marks and 🎯 pause-on-cap marks are now scoped per-map instead of globally — baseline snapshots when first entering each map and marks persist independently per room (legacy global marks migrate to the room you were last on). Farm Maps panel now sorts by variety (count of wanted creatures) → stamina efficiency → game order, shows other creatures on each map in an 'also' line, and restores both its original width and left position when the panel closes. Internal refactor: deduplicated stat icon renderer, name resolution cache, badge utilities, CSS row styles, and shared STATS constant. Overview Perfect badge now distinguishes shiny perfect (star-tier-shiny icon, purple name) from non-shiny hundo perfect (star-tier-hundo icon, light blue name). Within the same overview category, species with any shiny+awakened copy sort before species that are awakened only on non-shiny copies (then full rank, then name).

Bestiary list now distinguishes non-shiny hundo creatures (level 99 + max genes, no shiny) with a new star-tier-hundo icon and light blue text, while shiny hundos keep the existing star-tier-shiny icon and purple text. Priority: shiny tier > hundo tier > awakened across all hover/select/click states. Bestiary sort button cycles Name → Tier → Usage (repeat): Tier sorts by Awaken Tracker category (perfect → capped → awakened → rest), then among awakened species any shiny+awakened before awakened-only non-shiny, then by total genes on the rank-winning “top-tier” copy (NN% prefix uses that copy only); at 100% genes, ties use full rank (shiny/awakened progression) then higher level on that copy, then map usage, then name; below 100%, ties use rank then map usage then name. Usage is map-usage % first, then the same category + shiny-awakened-before-non-shiny rule, then best gene sum, full rank (includes tier), name.

Sealed (tier-5) only: with sell/devour sealed allowed, sealed use genes 5–100% for sell/devour (80–100% no longer stuck under the normal autosell max or squeeze queue). Sealed are excluded from autosqueeze; post-battle autosell no longer drops high-gene sealed on the autoplant 80%+ keeper rule.
Overview tab now actually displays the total/filter counter ('Total: N' when unfiltered, 'Visible: X / Y' when filtered) — the counter element was previously created but never inserted into the DOM.

Overview creature name colors now use more distinct palette (purple/yellow/blue/grey), filter dropdown reordered from highest to lowest achievement, and Farm Maps panel now sorts by game default region/room order.
"Awakened, not capped" filter now correctly shows only creatures missing max genes (was incorrectly using perfect check which also required lvl 99).
Nav button sealed-warning glow changed from red to light purple to better distinguish it from the inactive/error state.
Overview filter now correctly hides/shows creature rows, and capped status only applies to awakened creatures (non-awakened monsters with all stats at 20 were falsely marked as capped).
Added Perfect badge (awakened + all stats 20 + level 99) using star-tier-shiny icon; level is resolved from exp via expToCurrentLevel. Non-awakened creatures show '?' for stats in Overview.

Persistence safeguards: pre-flight payload size check with progressive session pruning to stay under localStorage budget, load-failure guard that blocks auto-save from overwriting recoverable data, and user-visible panel warnings on save failures or quota-triggered pruning.

New Super Mod: draggable floating panel with two tabs. Tracker tab shows per-map awaken gene progress for every enemy creature with live stat deltas, inject/skip event logs, collapse/expand per slot, drag-to-reorder, and optional pause-on-cap. Overview tab scans your full inventory showing awaken/cap status per creature with game icons, filterable by status, plus a Farm Maps panel that ranks maps by target density. Game-native UI using the same pixel-art border frames and tiling background textures as Hunt Analyzer.

Autoseller now emits CustomEvents (autoseller:inject:skip, autoseller:inject:success, autoseller:inject:applied) during sealed-creature injection so external mods like Awaken Tracker can listen and react.

All settings (selected creatures, scroll tier, stop conditions, autosell, speed, scroll limit) now persist across page refreshes. Added a Reset button that clears all settings back to defaults; switches to Stop while autoscrolling is active.

Optional 'Estimate experience gained' setting estimates XP per run using the game's experience formula, with randomized enemy kill counts for defeats. Results show average and total estimated XP, and hovering total XP displays projected level gains for each ally creature on the board.

Tracks battle EXP from rewardScreen.expReward (stored per battle when persistence is on) with K/KK-style formatting; live line shows total Exp, Exp/h, and Exp/battle; copy log lists EXP and Exp/h overall and per map; Mod Settings adds Live Display Visibility toggles per live row. UI uses Battles/Battles/h/Exp/battle (en-US & pt-BR). Fixes: experience in persisted saves, numeric-string expReward parsing, map-filter rate time fallbacks when per-map clock is empty, stamina visibility preserved on refresh, Exp tooltips no longer flicker on the 1s panel refresh (hover-aware title updates).
Maps tab now defaults to Rookgaard region on open, and switching regions no longer auto-selects the first map so region summaries remain visible until a map is explicitly selected.

Bestiary creature status styling was refined: text colors now prioritize max-awakened (purple) > awakened (orange) > max non-awakened (yellow), max-awakened uses star-tier-shiny icon replacement, and Owned-panel borders now distinguish max-awakened (rarity-shiny) from awakened (rarity-awaken).
Added missing map-action translation keys (Clear Map, Go to map, Failed to navigate to map, Map reset) for en-US and pt-BR to remove i18n key-not-found warnings.

Hardened modal/overlay DOM cleanup to remove nodes from their actual parent (with guards) across core UI and multiple mods, preventing removeChild parent-mismatch crashes during reward-screen close/autoplay transitions.

Cyclopedia, Mod Settings, Depot Manager, and Dice Roller removed hardcoded EXP-table level conversion and now use runtime expToCurrentLevel so level detection remains correct for current caps (including level 99).

Added a square Max Awakened Mode button (star-tier-shiny) next to Awakened Mode; it auto-selects when LVL is 99 and genes are maxed (HP/AD/AP/ARM/MR = 20), and reverts to Awakened Mode if any value is lowered.

Map Filter now has map-aware controls: Clear button switches between Clear All and Clear Map, Clear Map removes that map from sessions/filter and resets filter to ALL, and a compact Go-to-map arrow appears for non-ALL selections.
Return to Map hotkey now greys out when Show Return to Map Button is disabled and shows a yellow warning icon explaining the required Interface setting.

Quest nav label no longer sticks on "Tasking" when cleanup could not read stored original styling: restore now re-acquires the quest button when needed and falls back to the default Quests icon/text if originalState was never saved.

Fixed Firefox-only overflow in Bestiary and Arsenal filter bars by updating flex sizing so search inputs shrink correctly beside the Name button, and updated the creature status icon to show star-tier-shiny (instead of awaken) when a creature is level 99 with max genes (100 total genes).

Creature border cosmetics were stabilized with explicit priority (Maxed > Shiny > Sealed), proper cleanup for .rarity-shiny overlays when toggles are disabled, and immediate re-layering after toggle changes so shiny borders correctly take over when maxed is turned off.

Quest nav label no longer sticks on "Raiding" after disabling automation or leaving a raid when cleanup lacked prior captured styling or quest-button ownership: restore now acquires control when needed and falls back to default Quests appearance.

When navigating to the current daily boosted map, Better Tasker now prioritizes matching Better Boosted Maps equipment-rule custom settings (setup and floor) when available; otherwise it keeps Tasker defaults unchanged.

Cyclopedia received a broader Bestiary/Equipment UX update: in-panel search with Name/Usage toggles, usage-based sorting with percentages, no-results messaging, better selection/reset behavior, and Player usage panels sourced from board configs (creatures use map-based percentage; equipment remains config-entry based).

Improvement Opportunities modal now includes a Floor Improvements tab with fixed 500x500 sizing, own-WR filtering, same-floor rows listed below floor gains, and Cyclopedia-aligned floor tick normalization (floorTicks, then ticks) for comparisons.
Hotkeys are now globally blocked while any modal/dialog is open, with a modal-context whitelist that allows hotkeys during Better Analytics Impact Analyzer usage.

Final-run recovery now consistently retries incomplete task progress after any terminal runs-budget pause (not only runsLeft=1), and forced resume is debounced to avoid rapid retry spam during brief UI unresponsiveness.

Return to Map hotkey now supports forward map navigation with Shift + hotkey and includes an info icon tooltip in Hotkeys settings; hotkeys are also blocked during active manual/autoplay battles with a focused allowlist (General navigation, Cycle Bestiary/Equipment tab, and Start/Skip), while sandbox runs are excluded from this battle-time block.

Skill progression is now season-scoped (Season 2 uses separate Firebase paths), legacy player-equipment/skill-progress data is auto-deleted, baseline reset handling ensures level-10/0 fresh starts begin from clean skill progress and total-skill-increase counters, and a reset-loop bug was fixed so fresh Season 2 progress no longer gets repeatedly cleared.

Season 2 stats panel now uses official bracket icons with top-tier fallback from placement (top 20 = Challenger; then Diamond/Platinum/Gold/Silver by percentile), renamed rows to Speedrun/Rank Points/Difficulty, and added hover tooltips showing placement and bracket.

Autocollect Daily Seashell and Autocollect Level-Up Rewards now persist correctly after refresh; legacy combined reward-toggle migration only applies when new per-toggle settings are missing and no longer overwrites saved checkbox states.

Foreground recovery now rechecks task progress/readiness when the page becomes visible, preventing final-run stalls (for example stuck at 58/60 after backgrounding) and resuming task completion flow when state has already advanced.
Favorite context-menu ID resolution now matches depot resolution (React context -> menu parse -> visual fallback), fixing cases where some creatures showed Send to depot but could not be favorited.

Stop reason classification now differentiates internal failures from manual user stop, so Start-button recovery failure no longer reports "stopped by user"; Start-button recovery now retries for up to 10 seconds with wider re-check intervals (about 1 second) for higher resilience during transient UI/mod coordination delays.
"Always navigate max floor" now skips max-floor sync while loading $replay setups, so replay floor values (for example floor 0) are preserved.
Inject success toast is now compact: shows injected creature name, gold cost with gold icon, per-stat gains with stat icons, and total genes transition (old% -> new%).
Renamed autoplay recovery to Seamless autoplay with info tooltip (defeat + network issues), and split Autocollect Rewards into separate Daily Seashell and level-up reward toggles.
Added a live next-task cooldown timer next to Paw and Fur Society with clock icon styling and dynamic m/h suffix formatting.
Added Battle hotkeys for Previous map and Next map cycling in maps database order, with default bindings P and N.
Added a new "After X rounds" run condition (0 = endless), removed the separate Endless option, and updated the live runner widget to show consolidated rounds progress as current/limit (or current/∞).
Auto-10/Auto-15 now stay on max floor after a win, and the auto-floor tooltip now reflects max-floor hold behavior.
$replay() now sets tier/starTier plus awaken/awakened flags for awakened monsters, and normalizes replay monster names to lowercase for reliable gameId lookup.
Creature settings cog is now grey and subdued (0.3 opacity) when unedited, and turns green after per-creature overrides are configured.
Task coordination state now marks hasActiveTask as false when a task is already complete (ready or killCount >= target), so other mods are no longer blocked.
Specific Map setup now defaults to Auto-setup (instead of no action), with localization-aware auto-setup button detection including PT-BR Autoconfigurar.
Inject success toast now uses in-game stat icons for gains (including AP/MR) and armor label is shortened to ARM.
Final-run pause now waits for game end before deciding completion vs retry, and if task state cannot be resolved it falls back to a browser refresh.

Start button handling is now more robust with retry/re-check + coordination waits, and fixed max-floor progress display flicker where the running widget could briefly jump to target floor (for example 10/10) between attempts.

Added sealed auto-inject (inventory.useDoctor) with same-creature tier 5 -> tier 6 matching, inject-before-sell priority, global sealed sell toggle, per-creature "Don't auto-inject" rule, warning tooltip, and success toasts with gene gain details.
Added a new Mods hotkey to toggle Turbo Mode (default: Y).
Hardened leaderboard section DOM updates during autoplay with connectivity/ownership guards to prevent removeChild client-side exceptions.
Fixed per-creature task map override readback in the right-click context menu so saved map selections persist after reopening.
Fixed hotkey conflicts so Bestiary/Arsenal cycle no longer triggers Start/Skip.
Start/Skip hotkey now also clicks Stop when available (Sandbox).
Added a configurable Start/Skip hotkey (default Z), reorganized Hotkeys with a new Battle section, and added "Always navigate max floor" plus auto-hide non-shiny/non-awakened monsters.
$replay() now derives awakened only from monster.awakened or level > 50, with tier 6 when awakened and 4 otherwise.
Improved creature overrides, final-run retry handling, and related localization.
Refresh persistence is more robust: startup no longer clears existing data, and debounced saves run on visibility/pagehide.
Member point contributions are now clamped to 0, so negative player values no longer reduce guild totals.
Start detection now targets the board Start/Iniciar control to avoid triggering other mod/analyzer Start buttons during retries.
Firebase/local best-runs replay exports now include explicit monster.awakened and use shared replay normalization from BA Sandbox Utils.
Patch Notes entries are now clickable collapsible rows with aligned Mod/Type columns and color-coded change types.
Added right-click creature context menu with per-creature map, autostamina, setup, and floor overrides.
Favorite icons now render at 12x12 for a tighter UI.
Creature map list now filters by creature gameId and context menu closes reliably on outside click.
While running, Manual Runner now locks play mode to manual and reverts external floor changes until the run ends.
Fixed per-raid context menu settings being overwritten by auto-save, so setup method and floor choices persist after reopening.
Firebase best-runs upload dedupes floor setups with a normalized replay hash (RunTracker); speedrun and rank are always uploaded.
Late-game Hunt now protects shiny, gazer, sealed (tier 5), and awakened (tier 6) creatures from auto-sell/squeeze.
Task hunting now pauses autoplay on the final planned run to prevent one surplus run before task completion.
Creature picker now also hides sealed and awakened creatures.
Added new hotkeys, Sticky inventory and other functions.
Running live section now matches Hunt Analyzer styling.
Sealed (Tier 5) creature drops now stack by creature identity (and shiny state) regardless of genes/tier roll.
Export Configuration now saves Hunt Analyzer data first, so exports include the latest progress.
Added Stop after any victory (end analysis on first win); mutually exclusive with Stop when reaching S+ grade.
K-style numbers use two fraction digits; live stats tooltips show exact values; sealed total uses theme color textSealed.
Running and results modals show Win/Loss as whole-number percent with wins/losses counts instead of separate defeats (and optional victories) vs completion-style totals.
Awaken toggle now re-renders creature stats using state.utils.scaleStat with level 99 and geneValue 20.
Live panel shows large totals and rates as rounded K when |n| ≥ 1000 (gold, dust, shiny, sealed, runes, stamina, sessions/h, and per-hour lines).
Stop when: added Endless run (keeps looping until you stop; rank/tick auto-stop disabled).
Stamina/h label stays one line: ellipsis when the row is too narrow, full text on hover; rates column flex layout avoids a second wrapped row growing panel height.

After auto-skip during the reward wait, merge ticks/grade/rank from serverResults so victory is not paired with placeholder ticks 0; tick-target stop now requires ticks > 0 (avoids false stop when stopWhenTicksReached is low).
Multi-floor $replay copy: "Floors cleared with this setup" comments now append (seed) per floor when RunTracker has recorded that floor’s seed.
Firebase and generated $replay exports use the same per-floor seed labels in comments when floorSeeds data is present; clean uploads include floorSeeds on floor runs.
Floor-category runs store floorSeeds (floor number → seed) as you clear additional floors with the same board setup, for richer replay commentary on export.

Firebase and local best-runs export now include every floor setup per map for the active season (not only the top row), so multiple distinct clears toward floor 15 are all uploaded; text export lists each setup and floor history when present.
Daycare coordination: always clear handlingDaycare when daycare checks finish (including skip paths), so Manual Runner and other mods no longer stall on a stuck busy signal.
After a failed game start, no longer treat stale board serverResults as this attempt's victory (avoids false stop when ticksMax is set and placeholder ticks are 0).
Aligned live drop-rate rows and changed sealed counter.
Added floor 11+ autosell sealed-creature warning on the mod card and config toggle.
Fixed run season detection so existing Season 1 runs are no longer reclassified as Season 2 by timestamp fallback.
Creature sorting now prioritizes shiny, awakened, sealed, then higher tier.
Fixed Board replay helpers ($configureBoard / $serializeBoard). (Thanks Mathias Bynens).
Fixed autosqueeze not running after battle rewards when serverResults came from cached board state.
Fixed duplicate creature depot targeting so the selected instance stays consistent after tab switches/reloads.
Added sealed drop icon/sorting and live sealed counter.
Awakened toggle changes.
Fixed sealed auto-sell checkbox so checked creatures follow the sell filter and gene range.
Fixed Season 2 records not showing.
Updated Sealed creature handling: tier 5 is kept by default, with sell/squeeze override via right-click context menu and visual star indicator.
Creature sorting now prioritizes shiny first, then Sealed (tier 5), then higher tier.

Replay copy now includes username credits, optional floor-history comments, and timestamp; run warnings now also flag times faster than world record; Maps defeat-count overlay readability and creature info link underline were improved.
Added per-creature awakened toggles; awakened apply now preserves custom piece awaken flags and star tier so awakened abilities work correctly.
Local and Firebase text exports now include replay username credits, optional comments, and timestamp.
Replay parser now preserves credits, comments, and timestamp fields.

Raid/event classification now uses shared maps database logic.
Maps top tables now support sticky headers, compact layout, and floor range grouping.
Centralized static raid list and event-to-room mapping exports.
Uses centralized raid/event definitions from maps database.
Floor runs now keep all setups and track grouped floor history per setup.

Event maps are excluded from time and rank improvement calculations.

Chat nav button uses the same HUD nav resolution as Autoseller when chat is enabled.

Statistics persist across stop/start and when reopening the modal.

Added descriptive labels (Maps, ticks, Points, Floors) to all statistics values in Region statistics.

Fixed manual potion usage being blocked by automator settings, fixed threshold enforcement to prevent using potions below threshold, fixed null access error in pointsRestored handling, and consolidated verbose logging

General improvements, terminology updates, and translation updates
Switched to auto-save for all settings
Added collapsible Advanced section in settings with potion quantity thresholds and faster autoplay delay configuration
Use Game State for Stamina Refill was improved to use game state and calculations for stamina
Added Speed stat to creature stats display
Added hardcoded stats for unobtainable creatures to display correct map stats in Cyclopedia (display-only, does not affect game state)
Removed hardcodedStats that was causing NaN movement speed bug and weird stats when navigating to maps
Removed "Refresh on Mismatch" feature from Advanced settings
Fixed 400 Bad Request errors when usernames start with . or $ by sanitizing Firebase keys
Fixed 400 Bad Request errors when usernames start with . or $ in player equipment paths

Added Game State-based stamina refill method: works when tab is in background, rate limited to 1 potion per 3s, uses lowest tier potions first, shows toast notifications, and checks inventory before each use
Added "Use Game State for Stamina Refill" toggle in Advanced section with warning about background usage and rate limiting risk
Refactored autorefill code with helper functions for better maintainability
Added Dungeon Ascension upgrade to inventory database and upgrade keys
Improved inventory display: added store prices to item tooltips and upgradeable status indicator
Fixed autoplant potentially selling creatures instead of devouring them by preventing autosell from running when autoplant is enabled
Removed Gummy Raider and Yeti from available and selected creatures lists
Improved Guilds mod styling: refactored font system to use centralized constants, standardized to system-ui font for consistency, and unified font sizes across all elements
Redesigned guild administration panel with professional card-based layout, moved Guild Points to top, and made everything more compact
Full translation support for popup interface (uses browser language, all buttons, messages, and mod descriptions translated)
Removed unused modsLoader.js file
Redesigned popup interface with store-like grid layout

Changed "User" category to "Custom"
